rationale: Retry with exponential backoff on push failure keeps single-branch simplicity. No architectural change needed. Worker push should: git pull --rebase origin main, then retry push up to 3 times with 5-15s random sleep between attempts.
implementation: In worker_mtask_autopilot.sh push_with_retry(): on push failure, run git pull --rebase origin main, sleep random 5-15s, retry up to 3 times. Log each retry. If all retries fail, log warning and continue loop — do not abort.
